speaker: speaker1
text: What would you like to have for dinner ? Chicken or beef ?

speaker: speaker2
text: What kind of drinks do you have ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , we have all kinds of beverages in addition to fruit juices .

speaker: speaker2
text: In that case , let me have a glass of orange juice .

speaker: speaker2
text: I would like to have some tea as well .

speaker: speaker1
text: Another flight attendant is coming down the aisle with coffee and tea .
